title: Jamaican Coconut Jerk Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy dish featuring chicken marinated in a Jamaican jerk seasoning, grilled to perfection on skewers, and served with a side of toasted coconut flakes.
instructions: Thread chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together jerk seasoning and coconut oil.
Brush the jerk seasoning mixture onto both sides of the chicken.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast coconut flakes in a dry pan over medium heat until lightly browned.
Serve the jerk chicken skewers with toasted coconut flakes, crunchy dry rice, and a squeeze of lime juice.
